title: Italian commuters find a moment of peace on a cable-guided ferry sketched by Leonardo da Vinci
summary_full: In the picturesque northern Italy, the enchanting "Leonardo's Ferry" glides across the Adda River, effortlessly harnessing the energy of flowing water and a sturdy cable. This delightful five-minute journey, once at risk of fading into history, was lovingly restored by dedicated volunteers.
